src: A command line tool and library for transferring data with URL syntax, supporting DICT, FILE, FTP, FTPS, GOPHER, GOPHERS, HTTP, HTTPS, IMAP, IMAPS, LDAP, LDAPS, MQTT, MQTTS, POP3, POP3S, RTMP, RTMPS, RTSP, SCP, SFTP, SMB, SMBS, SMTP, SMTPS, TELNET, TFTP, WS and WSS. libcurl offers a myriad of powerful features
ja: DICT・FILE・FTP・FTPS・GOPHER・GOPHERS・HTTP・HTTPS・IMAP・IMAPS・LDAP・LDAPS・MQTT・MQTTS・POP3・POP3S・RTMP・RTMPS・RTSP・SCP・SFTP・SMB・SMBS・SMTP・SMTPS・TELNET・TFTP・WS・WSSに対応した、URL構文でデータ転送を行うコマンドラインツール兼ライブラリ。libcurlは多数の強力な機能を提供。
